Property.Name: CreationDate
Property.sap:label: Created On
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date on which the object was created

Property.Name: CreationTime
Property.sap:label: Created at
Property.sap:quickinfo: Time at which the object was created

Property.Name: LastChangeDate
Property.sap:label: Changed on
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date when object was last changed

Property.Name: LastChangeTime
Property.sap:label: Changed at
Property.sap:quickinfo: Time at which object was last changed

Property.Name: InternationalLocationNumber3
Property.sap:label: Check digit
Property.sap:quickinfo: Check digit for the international location number

Property.Name: IsNaturalPerson
Property.sap:label: Natural Person
Property.sap:quickinfo: Business Partner Is a Natural Person Under the Tax Laws

Property.Name: IsSexUnknown
Property.sap:quickinfo: Selection: Sex of business partner is not known

Property.Name: MiddleName
Property.sap:label: Middle Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Middle Name or Second Forename of a Person

Property.Name: AdditionalLastName
Property.sap:label: Other Last Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Other Last Name of a Person

Property.Name: BirthDate
Property.sap:label: Date of Birth
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date of Birth of Business Partner

Property.Name: BusinessPartnerIDByExtSystem
Property.sap:label: External BP Number
Property.sap:quickinfo: Business Partner Number in External System

Property.Name: BusinessPartnerBirthName
Property.sap:label: Name at Birth
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name at birth of business partner

Property.Name: NaturalPersonEmployerName
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Employer of a Natural Person

Property.Name: BusinessPartnerDeathDate
Property.sap:label: Death date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date of death of business partner

Property.Name: CompanyCodeName
Property.sap:label: Company Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Company Code or Company

Property.Name: CreditControlArea_Text
Property.sap:quickinfo: Description of the credit control area

Property.Name: NonTaxableTransactionTaxCode
Property.sap:label: Output Tax Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Output Tax Code for Non-Taxable Transactions

Property.Name: DocDateIsUsedForTaxDetn
Property.sap:label: Tax Determ.with Doc.Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Document Date As the Basis for Tax Determination

Property.Name: TaxRptgDateIsActive
Property.sap:label: Tax Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Reporting Date Active in Documents

Property.Name: CashDiscountBaseAmtIsNetAmt
Property.sap:label: Net Discount Base
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Discount base amount is the net value

Property.Name: IsPrimaryCurrencyForISOCrcy
Property.sap:quickinfo: Primary SAP Currency Code for ISO Code

Property.Name: AccountIsBlockedForPosting
Property.sap:label: Posting Block
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is Account Blocked for Posting?

Property.Name: AccountIsBlockedForCreation
Property.sap:label: Creation Block
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Account Is Blocked for Creation ?

Property.Name: IsProfitLossAccount
Property.sap:label: Balance Sheet Account
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Account is a balance sheet account?

Property.Name: GLAccountType
Property.sap:label: G/L Account Type
Property.sap:quickinfo: Type of a General Ledger Account

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created by
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person who Created the Object

Property.Name: LineItemDisplayIsEnabled
Property.sap:label: Line Items
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Can Line Items Be Displayed by Account?

Property.Name: AlternativeGLAccount
Property.sap:label: Alternative G/L Account
Property.sap:quickinfo: Alternative G/L Account Number In Company Code

Property.Name: AcctgDocItmDisplaySequenceRule
Property.sap:label: Sort key
Property.sap:quickinfo: Key for sorting according to assignment numbers

Property.Name: TaxCategory
Property.sap:label: Tax Category
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Category in Account Master Record

Property.Name: IsAutomaticallyPosted
Property.sap:label: Auto. Posting
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is Account only Posted to Automatically?

Property.Name: CompanyCodeName
Property.sap:label: Company Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Company Code or Company

Property.Name: ProfitCtrResponsibleUser
Property.sap:label: User Responsible
Property.sap:quickinfo: User Responsible for the Profit Center

Property.Name: FormulaPlanningTemplate
Property.sap:label: Form. Planning Temp.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Template for Formula Planning in Profit Centers

Property.Name: DebitAmountDuringPeriodTran
Property.sap:label: Debit Amount During Period In TranCur

Property.Name: DebitAmountDuringPeriod
Property.sap:label: Debit Amount During Period In ComCur

Property.Name: CreditAmountDuringPeriodTran
Property.sap:label: Credit Amount During Period In TranCur

Property.Name: CreditAmountDuringPeriod
Property.sap:label: Credit Amount During Period In ComCur

Annotation.String: Setting the text direction-layout is supported
PDF supports setting the text direction-layout (e.g. left-to-right or right-to-left) in the document description
